mapper.select: select i.*,l.name as laboratoryName,t.name as typeName from JKERP.test_instrument i left join JKERP.test_laboratory l on i.laboratory_id=l.id left join JKERP.test_instrument_type t on i.type_id=t.id ${ew.customSqlsegment}
mapper.insert:
insert into JKERP.test_instrument(type_id, name, laboratory_id, code, old_code, manufacturer, model, serial_number, price, picture, incorporated_date, appraisal_date, is_port, level, validity_date, content, check_price, specs, range, contract_url, invoice_url, remark, device_admin, price_per_hour, traceability_mode, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.typeId}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.laboratoryId}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.oldCode}, #{entity.manufacturer}, #{entity.model}, #{entity.serialNumber}, #{entity.price}, #{entity.picture}, #{entity.incorporatedDate}, #{entity.appraisalDate}, #{entity.isPort}, #{entity.level}, #{entity.validityDate}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.checkPrice}, #{entity.specs}, #{entity.range}, #{entity.contractUrl}, #{entity.invoiceUrl}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.deviceAdmin}, #{entity.pricePerHour}, #{entity.traceabilityMode}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into JKERP.test_instrument(type_id, name, laboratory_id, code, old_code, manufacturer, model, serial_number, price, picture, incorporated_date, appraisal_date, is_port, level, validity_date, content, check_price, specs, range, contract_url, invoice_url, remark, device_admin, price_per_hour, traceability_mode, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.typeId}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.laboratoryId}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.oldCode}, #{entity.manufacturer}, #{entity.model}, #{entity.serialNumber}, #{entity.price}, #{entity.picture}, #{entity.incorporatedDate}, #{entity.appraisalDate}, #{entity.isPort}, #{entity.level}, #{entity.validityDate}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.checkPrice}, #{entity.specs}, #{entity.range}, #{entity.contractUrl}, #{entity.invoiceUrl}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.deviceAdmin}, #{entity.pricePerHour}, #{entity.traceabilityMode}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update type_id = values(type_id) , name = values(name) , laboratory_id = values(laboratory_id) , code = values(code) , old_code = values(old_code) , manufacturer = values(manufacturer) , model = values(model) , serial_number = values(serial_number) , price = values(price) , picture = values(picture) , incorporated_date = values(incorporated_date) , appraisal_date = values(appraisal_date) , is_port = values(is_port) , level = values(level) , validity_date = values(validity_date) , content = values(content) , check_price = values(check_price) , specs = values(specs) , range = values(range) , contract_url = values(contract_url) , invoice_url = values(invoice_url) , remark = values(remark) , device_admin = values(device_admin) , price_per_hour = values(price_per_hour) , traceability_mode = values(traceability_mode) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time)
